items.name: Global-Superpower-and-Geopolitical-Risk-Nexus
items.description: The Global Superpower and Geopolitical Risk Nexus is an advanced predictive analytics and machine learning framework designed to quantify, model, and forecast geopolitical risks arising from the strategic competition between global superpowers (e.g., the United States, China, the European Union, and Russia).

items.name: Fepfm
items.description: Fepfm: A Post-Disturbance Frequency Extremes Prediction Framework for Power Systems Based on Trustworthy Machine Learning

items.name: swift-ml-apps
items.description: A Swift project for developing machine learning applications on Apple platforms (iOS, macOS), leveraging Core ML and other frameworks.

items.name: rust-ml-framework
items.description: A Rust project for building a high-performance, safe, and concurrent machine learning framework, focusing on systems-level AI development.

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: freight-rail-delay-prediction
items.description: This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

items.name: Alzheimer-s
items.description: A machine learning framework that quantifies neurocognitive decline through gamified diagnostics and high-frequency telemetry.

items.name: frogbox
items.description: An opinionated machine learning framework.

items.name: masfi
items.description: Mapping Alternate Scenarios of Forest Intactness (MASFI) is a cloud-based machine learning framework. It uses XGBoost regression and remote sensing data such as GEDI LiDAR to create high-resolution maps and statistics, supporting protected area planning and management.

items.name: Semiconductor-Wafer-Defect-Analysis--A-Machine-Learning-Framework
items.description: 9‑class wafer defect classification + per‑class anomaly detection. EfficientNetV2 with coordinate channels, two‑phase training, ONNX + ONNX Runtime verification (max diff < 1e‑4), PCA + Isolation Forest, SQLite storage.

items.name: FFNOML
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting NLTE departure coefficients in 3-D stellar atmospheres using Factorized Fourier Neural Operators (FFNO)

items.name: gomlx
items.description: GoMLX: An Accelerated Machine Learning Framework For Go

items.name: Return-Predictor-AI
items.description: Return Predictor AI is a Machine Learning web application designed to predict the likelihood of product returns in e-commerce. It uses an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) model for prediction and is built with the Flask framework for the web interface.

items.name: Credit-Worthiness-Classification
items.description: A data mining and machine learning project focused on predicting loan default risk using large-scale financial data. This project explores end-to-end data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model comparison using both PySpark and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: IRP-Feline-Skin-Disease-Classification
items.description: A Hybrid Vision Transformer and Machine Learning Framework  for Feline Skin Disease Classification

items.name: ai-training-data-datasets
items.description: Production-grade AI training datasets, schema designs, and data frameworks for machine learning, RLHF, and decision intelligence systems.

items.name: sgVariant-TDO-Toolkit
items.description: An integrated computational framework combining machine learning predictions with empirical multi-omics validation to systematically map and decode tracrRNA-dependent off-target (TDO) events.

items.name: Deep-Learning-Framework-Notes
items.description: Structured notes on machine learning and deep learning concepts across multiple frameworks, focusing on both theoretical understanding and practical implementation.

items.name: OmniRank
items.description: A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms

items.name: titanic-machine-learning_G13
items.description: Proyecto de Machine Learning para predecir la supervivencia en el Titanic usando Regresión Logística y el framework CRISP-DM. Trabajo Sumativo 1 - U. Mayor

items.name: CadUnicoIA
items.description: A Temporal Machine Learning Framework for Early Detection of Food Insecurity Using Administrative Microdata

items.name: cybershield-ultimate-soc
items.description: CyberShield Ultimate is a real-time Security Operations Center (SOC) framework. Powered by Python and Machine Learning, it features live network packet capture, AI anomaly detection, active process monitoring, and threat geolocation. It includes 14 integrated security modules for file vetting, port scanning, and automated risk reporting.

items.name: automated_ML_framework_for_cancer_cell_classification
items.description: AN AUTOMATED MACHINE LEARNING FRAMEWORK FOR CANCER CELL CLASSIFICATION

items.name: defect-classification-in-stem-images
items.description: Unsupervised machine learning framework for defect classification and clustering in atomic-resolution images using CVAE-based image reconstruction.

items.name: QuantTradeAI
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies

items.name: CogniLife-Behavioral-Lifestyle-Analytics-for-Dementia-Risk-Prediction-Modelx
items.description: CogniLife is an advanced machine learning framework designed to identify dementia risk patterns using non-clinical determinants. By analyzing demographics, social engagement, and functional independence, this system provides a non-invasive screening methodology that bypasses the need for expensive medical imaging or laboratory tests.

items.name: vibrolearn
items.description: A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.

items.name: OptiCover-Analytics-Demographic-Intelligence-Suite-AgileRisk-Classifier-AI-
items.description: OptiCover Analytics is a high-performance machine learning framework developed . The system is engineered to solve a complex multi-class classification problem, accurately predicting which of ten distinct insurance coverage bundlesranging from AutoLiability_Basic to PremiumHealthLife a prospective customer is most likely to select.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: Elastic-Guardian
items.description: Elastic Guardian is a modular AI framework that structures machine learning projects from research and prototyping to scalable deployment. It emphasizes clean architecture, reproducible pipelines, model evaluation, optimization, and API integration to transform experimental ML workflows into production-ready systems.

items.name: global-drought-prediction-with-credit
items.description: Code to process data to train a machine learning DroughtFormer, built in the CREDIT framework, to predict drought related variables (ML model is trained globally, but there is a regional focus on Africa). Also contains code to analyze DroughtFormer predictions.

items.name: AI
items.description: 🤖 Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

items.name: CADIM-
items.description: Cloud-Aware DEM Inundation Mapping (CADIM) 🌊☁️: A geospatial framework for flood mapping under cloud cover using machine learning and digital elevation models (DEMs).

items.name: Mesotelioma_Subtyping
items.description: In this project we used Weekly-Supervised-Learning and Multiple Instance Learning (CLAM framework) with self-supervised contrastive learning (SimCLR) to classify the subtypes of Malignant Pleural Mesothelioma. MSc Machine Learning in Applications course at @POLITO

items.name: pipeML
items.description: A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction

items.name: predictive-process-modeling
items.description: Machine learning frameworks for real-time pH/CO2 forecasting and high-dimensional analysis in chemical systems.

items.name: Multiclass-Heart-disease-prediction-using-multimodal-data
items.description: An intelligent multimodal machine learning framework for multiclass heart disease severity prediction using combined clinical and ECG data. The model leverages feature engineering and a Random Forest ensemble to achieve high accuracy and robust performance across five severity levels.

items.name: FinanceCraft
items.description: FinanceCraft is a quantitative framework leveraging technical indicators and machine learning for stock market trend analysis and prediction.  It employs yfinance for data acquisition and Pandas for preprocessing, laying the groundwork for feature engineering, model training, and the implementation of trading algorithms.

items.name: deepchem-benchmark-framework
items.description: Extensible benchmarking framework for molecular machine learning in DeepChem with standardized evaluation and multi-task support.

items.name: EAGLE-Scale
items.description: A cloud auto-scaling framework that combines machine learning prediction, cost optimization, container-VM hybrid management, anomaly detection, and adaptive resource tuning to achieve zero SLA violations at 91% lower cost than existing approaches.

items.name: ML-Integrated-TwoProbeDiFC
items.description: machine learning–integrated framework for diffuse in vivo flow cytometry (DiFC), using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to distinguish circulating tumor cell (CTC) signals from artifacts. The approach leverages both amplitude and temporal peak shape to improve detection accuracy and reduce false positives compared to threshold-based methods.

items.name: fair-post-processing
items.description: A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

items.name: FSCTEP
items.description: A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.

items.name: pipeline_bulgaria_vecx_ardl
items.description: The pipeline designed for this analysis is a Hybrid Econometric-Machine Learning Framework. It is structured to bridge the gap between classical time-series econometrics (which focuses on theory and long-run relationships) and modern predictive modeling (which focuses on accuracy and handling complex patterns).

items.name: finstream-metaopt
items.description: Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.

items.name: CarbonAware_CropPrediction_using_DevOps
items.description: A Carbon-Aware DevOps framework designed to optimize energy efficiency in AI-driven crop yield prediction. This project implements GreenOps principles to minimize the environmental footprint of machine learning pipelines while maintaining high predictive accuracy for sustainable agriculture.

items.name: ML-APT-OCS
items.description: ML-APT: Machine Learning-enhanced Atom ProbeTomography Framework

items.name: quantum-tensor-networks-circuits
items.description: Quantum Tensor Networks Circuits is a modular framework for building and benchmarking variational quantum circuits based on tensor networks. The framework allows for various encoding methods and ansatz topologies, thus enabling the comparison of their precision and expressibility in quantum machine learning applications.

items.name: Masters-Thesis-Development-of-A-Model-Predictive-Control-Strategy-For-E-Trailers
items.description: This thesis project presents the development of a tractor-independent control strategy for electrically propelled trailers (E-trailers) based on a Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) framework augmented with trip-based energy optimization and machine-learning-based tractor behavior estimation.

items.name: ppmi-ontology-alignment
items.description: Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinson’s Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinson’s Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinson’s disease trajectories.

items.name: Skin-disease-classification-with-an-ensemble-machine-learning-technique
items.description: his project focuses on enhancing the accuracy and efficiency of skin disease classification by leveraging a lightweight ensemble machine learning framework. The proposed approach combines multiple traditional classifiers—k-Nearest Neighbors (k-NN), Decision Tree (DT), and Gradient Boosting Machine (GBM)

items.name: personal-finance-analytics
items.description: A data-driven personal finance analytics system that calculates income tax liability under the Indian tax framework, assesses financial health using key indicators, and predicts financial stress levels with explainable insights. Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

items.name: policyholder-risk-predictions
items.description: Machine learning framework for insurance claim prediction and policyholder risk scoring

items.name: Ecommerce-AI-Communication-Framework
items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.

items.name: Improved-Molecular-Graph-Aggregation-Strategies-for-Robust-Prediction-of-ADME
items.description: In this study, we present a systematic benchmarking framework to evaluate molecular representation strategies for ADME prediction, comparing classical descriptor-based machine learning models with graph neural network (GNN) architectures implemented within a message passing and aggregation paradigm.

items.name: peptimem
items.description: Two-phase computational framework consisting of causal inference model and residual machine learning classfier for identifying and predicting responders to Alzheimer's Disease treatments

items.name: GML-EMT
items.description: A semi-supervised medical image classification framework based on gradual machine learning

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: software-cost-estimation-framework
items.description: Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.

items.name: ProThermo-T5
items.description: A process-aware machine learning framework (ProtT5-XL + XGBoost) predicting protein thermostability (Tm). It uniquely simulates matrix-induced stability shifts ("Lysis Shock" in cell vs. lysate) to guide the rational design of robust affinity ligands and chromatography resins for downstream processing.

items.name: factor-augmented-inflation-nowcasting-and-forecasting
items.description: Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

items.name: factor-augmented-inflation-forecasting
items.description: Central bank-grade factor-augmented inflation nowcasting and forecasting framework for Zimbabwe. Combines PCA-based macroeconomic factor extraction, machine learning models (Elastic Net, Random Forest, SVR, XGBoost), scenario analysis, and inflation regime classification aligned to SADC targets.

items.description: Machine learning analysis for the AI-Driven Digital Transformation Skills Framework, including text preprocessing, skill extraction, topic modeling (LDA), and clustering (K-means and hierarchical clustering).

items.name: neural_networks_from_scratch
items.description: 🚀 A deep dive into the mathematical core of Machine Learning. Purely NumPy-based implementations of Neural Networks (MLPs) and Gradient Descent from scratch. Features an MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier achieving ~90% accuracy without high-level frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch. 🧠💡

items.name: JNet
items.description: JNet is a Java machine learning framework consisting of tools and libraries for building and running neural networks and machine learning models through built-in APIs. Just like previous frameworks, it is a great place to get your hands dirty and experiment with the guts of a model directly!

It provides insights through sentiment analysis, topic modeling, anomaly detection, influencer tracking, bot detection, and more. Built with Vue.js, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, and Chart.js.

items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.description: analogOS é um framework que formaliza analogia como primitiva computacional. Não é machine learning. Não é apenas abstração. É uma álgebra de sistemas baseada em operadores universais reutilizáveis.
